context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 12 features working correctly. KPI cards reordered (Total Candidates first). Resume links added to all candidate modals. Interviews page converted to calendar view with parseFlexDate handling dd/mm/yy and dd/mm/YYYY formats. Calendar shows submission dates as blue pills, today highlighted in cyan. Date click opens modal with candidate details including resume links. Currently no interview_slot data so only submission events show (no amber interview pills). 56 of 66 candidates have resume_link populated.
